title: geum aleppicum var. strictum
intro: Geum aleppicum var. strictum, also known as the tall avens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family, characterized by its tall stem and white or pink flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Geum aleppicum var. strictum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
